notes.heading: Edit setup again
notes.body: The Dashboard and Server page now expose Edit Setup so you can change Owner ID, server names, passwords, or Game Port after the first setup.

notes.heading: Fresh installs still prompt
notes.body: The setup form still appears automatically once a fresh install has a real DedicatedServer.ini or official template ready to patch.

notes.heading: Safer config saves
notes.body: Setup saves are blocked while the managed server process is running so Dragonwilds cannot overwrite live config edits.

notes.heading: Cleaner dashboard
notes.body: The DedicatedServer.ini panel now uses Open File instead of showing a long path, health and backup panels are cleaner, and the console summary stays compact in fullscreen.
